description.ko: 결정체를 통해 빛이 본래의 색상으로 굴절되는 순간 포착된 순수한 에너지의 형상입니다.
description.en: The pure energy of light captured in the moment it fractures into its constituent colors through a crystal.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of a PRISM-2 geometric glass structure on a minimalist dark surface. A single beam of intense white light hits the glass, refracting into a brilliant and wide rainbow spectrum featuring #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 emerald, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Intricate caustic light patterns and sharp chromatic aberration. 8k resolution, ray-traced lighting, ethereal atmosphere, sharp focus on the internal light dispersion and rainbow caustics.
